definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="Number" id="entityVolume">entityVolume</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="variables_set_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:entityVolume</field><value name="VAL"><block type="java_code_get"><field name="CODE">entity.getBbWidth() * entity.getBbWidth() * entity.getBbHeight()</field></block></value><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_binary_ops"><field name="OP">AND</field><value name="A"><block name="OP">GT</field><value name="A"><block type="variables_get_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:entityVolume</field></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0.5</field></block></value></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="wait"><value name="ticks"><block type="math_random_int_between"><value name="min"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">20</field></block></value><value name="max"><block name="CODE">!world.getEntitiesOfClass(net.minecraft.world.entity.LivingEntity.class, new net.minecraft.world.phys.AABB(x + 0.1, y + 1.0, z + 0.1, x + 0.9, y + 1.5, z + 0.9), e -> (e.getBbWidth() * e.getBbWidth() * e.getBbHeight()) > 0.5).isEmpty()</field></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="block_remove_with_particles"><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value
